title: Way
description: Way: A Way is an ordered list of nodes which normally also has at least one tag or is included within a Relation.

Nodes.description: The list of nodes that define this Way.

OsmID.description: The unique OpenStreetMap id for the Way.

NodeOsmIds.description: The unique OpenStreetMap ids for the Nodes.

KeyValues.description: The KeyValue tags describing the geographic attributes of this Way.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
